programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A visionary, an engineer and a prodigy chart the changing culture of Texas' Silicon Prairie in the 1980s.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Joe's team must overcome internal differences and start building the new machine.

programme.desc: Gordon and Cameron struggle to make Joe's vision a reality; Joe and Bosworth seek the funds to make the new machine.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron nearly completes the BIOS; when a crisis threatens the project's future, the entire team is needed to save it.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron chafes under new management; Joe and Gordon try to obtain an important piece of technology.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: After having a breakthrough, Cameron is at odds with Gordon; Joe must make a difficult decision; personal revelations are induced.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: When a person from Joe's past visits, his connection with Cameron is threatened; the cost Gordon's work catches up to him.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: The team finalizes preparations for COMDEX amid scandal; Bosworth makes a sacrifice for the good of the program.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Unanticipated adversaries and increased complications hinder the progress that the Cardiff Electric team has made.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Joe prepare to transport the Giant; a suspicious defect causes a rift in the partnership; Cameron takes control of her future.

programme.desc: Walt and the guys throw a birthday party at the Stash; larger-than-life Darth Vader helmet.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: JoAnne squirms in Duncan's grasp; Lili needs these diagnoses by yesterday; the press is on to a scandal; Bardolph's triggered; Xander gets the joke; Orson has his heart stolen by someone with practice; Gary's Pippin is - it's too awful to say.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: Duncan, almost tech titan, must prove he and his company are F-able; JoAnne provides therapy with benefits; Orson lands from Baltimore; the party for Dr. Green ends in a cat burglary.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: Tony and Susan Alamo's grip on power is challenged as Susan becomes ill and law enforcement investigates allegations of labor violations and abuse.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: While on the run, Alamo orders those who remain loyal to him to leave the compound and take his wife's body with them while he tries to evade arrest.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: Out of prison, Tony Alamo begins to make young girls his "wives"; as the child abuse escalates, some ex-members urge the FBI to intervene.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: In the 1960s, preachers Tony and Susan Alamo recruit nomads to join their ministry; former members give insight into the cult's origins.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: Tony and Susan Alamo's grip on power is challenged as Susan becomes ill and law enforcement investigates allegations of labor violations and abuse.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: While on the run, Alamo orders those who remain loyal to him to leave the compound and take his wife's body with them while he tries to evade arrest.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: Out of prison, Tony Alamo begins to make young girls his "wives"; as the child abuse escalates, some ex-members urge the FBI to intervene.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: In the 1960s, preachers Tony and Susan Alamo recruit nomads to join their ministry; former members give insight into the cult's origins.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: Tony and Susan Alamo's grip on power is challenged as Susan becomes ill and law enforcement investigates allegations of labor violations and abuse.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: While on the run, Alamo orders those who remain loyal to him to leave the compound and take his wife's body with them while he tries to evade arrest.

programme.title: Ministry of Evil: The Twisted Cult of Tony Alamo
programme.desc: Out of prison, Tony Alamo begins to make young girls his "wives"; as the child abuse escalates, some ex-members urge the FBI to intervene.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: The global hunt for 'The Chameleon Killer,' Elaine Parent, wanted for the 1990 murder of 34-year-old Beverly McGowan; when a body is discovered in a Florida canal, law enforcement pieces together a timeline of the victim's final days.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads to the wrong woman being summoned to court; law enforcement begins to piece together the back story of the Chameleon Killer and uncover a string of stolen identities.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: When the police follow up on a tip-off, the Chameleon Killer manages to slip through their grasp; it isn't long before another tip-off leads the police right to her doorstep.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: The global hunt for 'The Chameleon Killer,' Elaine Parent, wanted for the 1990 murder of 34-year-old Beverly McGowan; when a body is discovered in a Florida canal, law enforcement pieces together a timeline of the victim's final days.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity leads to the wrong woman being summoned to court; law enforcement begins to piece together the back story of the Chameleon Killer and uncover a string of stolen identities.

programme.title: The Hunt For the Chameleon Killer
programme.desc: When the police follow up on a tip-off, the Chameleon Killer manages to slip through their grasp; it isn't long before another tip-off leads the police right to her doorstep.
